assertion_results.text: All action refs are pinned to full 40-character commit SHAs after fix
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml line 25: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 (40 chars), line 27: actions/setup-node@39370e3970a6d050c480ffad4ff0ed4d3fdee5af (40 chars), line 44: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 (40 chars), line 56: actions/upload-artifact@65c4c4a1ddee5b72f698fdd19549f0f0fb45cf08 (40 chars). All refs are pinned to 40-char SHAs.

assertion_results.text: Expression injection in run: step is remediated using env var pattern
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml lines 48-54: env block defines ISSUE_TITLE=${{ github.event.issue.title }} and ISSUE_NUMBER=${{ github.event.issue.number }}; run script uses '$ISSUE_TITLE' and '$ISSUE_NUMBER' via shell variable expansion (not inline expression interpolation). Both injection vectors moved to env vars.

assertion_results.text: persist-credentials: false is added to actions/checkout steps
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml lines 25 and 44 (both checkout steps) have no 'with:' block at all — 'persist-credentials: false' is absent from both. summary.txt does not mention this fix either. The credential exposure risk from artipacked findings is unaddressed.

assertion_results.text: timeout-minutes is set on all jobs
assertion_results.evidence: ci.yml build job (line 19) and triage job (line 37) have no 'timeout-minutes' field. summary.txt line 75 explicitly lists this as a remaining consideration out of scope: 'Consider adding a timeout-minutes to each job to prevent runaway builds.'
